Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl

package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent
     
  • Class
    Description
    AgentChatMemoryStore
    JVM-wide singleton holder for the ChatMemoryStore used by the agent connector.
    AgentConnectorException
    Runtime exception thrown by the agent connector when an unrecoverable error occurs during request preparation or execution.
    AgentConnectorImpl
    Core implementation of the LangChain4j agent connector.
    AgentConnectorProviderImpl
    SPI provider that registers the AgentConnectorImpl with the CIBseven connect Connectors registry.
    AgentRequestImpl
    Default implementation of AgentRequest.
    AgentResponseImpl
    Default implementation of AgentResponse.
    KnowledgeIngestorConnectorImpl
    Core implementation of the knowledge ingestor connector.
    KnowledgeIngestorProviderImpl
    SPI provider that registers the KnowledgeIngestorConnectorImpl with the CIBseven connect Connectors registry.
    KnowledgeIngestorRequestImpl
    Default implementation of KnowledgeIngestorRequest.
    KnowledgeIngestorResponseImpl
    Default implementation of KnowledgeIngestorResponse.
    ProcessStarterTool
    @Tool class wired into the AI agent connector that lets the LLM start a CIB seven process, wait for it to terminate and read its outputs in a single call.
    ProcessStarterToolContext
    Per-thread carrier used to forward the caller's ProcessEngine reference and engine authentication from AgentConnectorImpl into ProcessStarterTool (and any other future @Tool class).
